title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a comprehensive roundup of recent AI developments including image generation, video synthesis, language models, and robotic systems. The segment covers tools like HiDream-O1 Image, GPT Realtime 2, Gemma 4 with multi-token prediction, and several robotics advances.
